name: dpr-design-tokens
description: DPR Labs unified design-token system. The root ../tokens.css is the single source of truth; this build regenerates dist/tokens.css from it (@import + styleguide/component bridge). Dependency-free. Phase 1 deliverable owned by design-token-mgr.

scripts.verify: node lint-tokens.mjs && node build.mjs && node contrast-audit.mjs
